title: WesterosContinuity
description: Unofficial fork of Continuity, tweaked for the WesterosCraft server
body:
An unofficial fork of the [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) mod that adds the new CTM properties 'connect_to_tag' and 'connect_to_state', when coupled with the [WesterosBlocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/westerosblocks) mod. You do not need this mod if you aren't using it with WesterosBlocks.

`connect_to_state` and two blocks of the same type will connect only if they have the same value for that property next to each other

`connect_to_tag` allows ctm to connect by tag

All credit goes to the original author Pepper_Bell.
